description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Late. For each day of the week, lists the boats (qārib) belonging to different people (Muḥammad, Shihāb al-Dīn, Naṣr al-Dīn. . .) and commercial goods and numbers associated with them. Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
